summary: Matched two ftPopo SpecialS air physics functions by replacing placeholder markers with C implementations and exposing two ftIceClimberAttributes float fields used by ftCommon_Fall.

key_files.role: Replaced placeholder markers for ftPp_SpecialAirHiStart_1_Phys and ftPp_SpecialAirHiThrow_1_Phys with matching C implementations.
evidence_refs: changed_files.jsonl: ftPp_SpecialS.c added 20 deleted 2 in 2 hunks
human_pr_text: Summary claims both functions decompiled at 100% match
text_corpus: decomp-dev bot reports 2 new matches, +84 bytes each, 0.00% to 100.00%

key_files.role: Refined ftIceClimberAttributes layout by replacing padding from 0xA8 to 0xB0 with float fields xA8 and xAC.
evidence_refs: changed_files.jsonl: types.h added 2 deleted 1 in 1 hunk
raw_diff: ftIceClimberAttributes changes _A8 padding to float xA8 and float xAC

what_changed.text: Added ftPp_SpecialAirHiStart_1_Phys. It loads Fighter from gobj->user_data, loads ftIceClimberAttributes from fp->dat_attrs, applies PAD_STACK(8), calls ftCommon_Fall(fp, da->xA8, da->xAC), and calls ftCommon_8007CEF4(fp) if fp->self_vel.y is below 0.0f.
Added ftPp_SpecialAirHiThrow_1_Phys with the same fall/negative-y handling, but obtains Fighter via GET_FIGHTER(gobj).
Updated ftIceClimberAttributes so offsets 0xA8 and 0xAC are represented as floats xA8 and xAC instead of opaque padding.
PR body and bot report both claim the two functions reached 100% match; bot report lists +168 matched code bytes total.

smart_moves.text: Recovered attribute fields before using them in the matched functions, avoiding raw offset reads for the ftCommon_Fall parameters.
Kept the two very similar air physics functions close in structure while preserving the observed Fighter access difference: direct gobj->user_data in Start and GET_FIGHTER(gobj) in Throw.

decomp_lessons.lesson: When a matched fighter physics function consumes character-attribute values, refine the character attributes struct to typed float fields rather than leaving the bytes as padding or using raw offsets.
For ftPopo SpecialAirHi Start/Throw physics in this slice, the matched source pattern is ftCommon_Fall followed by a negative vertical velocity check that calls ftCommon_8007CEF4.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: bot reports both functions at 100.00%

naming_conventions.name: fp
evidence_refs: raw_diff: Fighter* fp declarations in both functions
decomp_standards: conservative-naming allows short local role names such as fp when roles are clear

naming_conventions.name: xA8 / xAC
naming_conventions.meaning: offset-based ftIceClimberAttributes float field names; semantic purpose is not proven by the PR slice
evidence_refs: raw_diff: types.h adds float xA8 and float xAC

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: PAD_STACK(8) was inserted in both newly matched functions.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: bot report shows both functions 100.00%
assembly_or_matching_tactics.notes: The slice supports that PAD_STACK(8) was used in matched functions, but it does not explain why the stack padding was necessary beyond the reported match.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Used typed struct fields for attribute loads needed by ftCommon_Fall.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.notes: Consistent with the loaded typed-fields-over-pointer-math standard.

follow_up_queries: ftPopo SpecialS air physics self_vel.y ftCommon_8007CEF4

evidence_refs: metadata_json: PR identity, state, timestamps, changed files
text_corpus: decomp-dev bot report with two new 100.00% matches
notes: No review comments were present, so reviewer feedback and reviewer intent cannot be extracted.
The PR body states ninja builds clean and fuzzy_match_percent 100.0; the bot report independently lists the two functions as 100.00%, but the slice does not include objdiff logs or build output.
The PR body says it was generated with Claude Code; intake treats the submitted diff and reports as evidence, not the generator as authority.
Semantic names for xA8 and xAC are not supported by the slice; only their type, offsets, and use as ftCommon_Fall arguments are evidenced.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Expose typed fighter attribute fields when a matched function uses them
accepted_candidate_records.text: In PR #2254, ftIceClimberAttributes padding at 0xA8-0xB0 was replaced with float xA8 and float xAC so the matched ftPopo SpecialAirHi physics functions could call ftCommon_Fall(fp, da->xA8, da->xAC) without raw offset access.

source_update_candidates.title: ftIceClimberAttributes xA8 and xAC are floats used by ftPopo SpecialAirHi physics
source_update_candidates.text: PR #2254 changed ftIceClimberAttributes by replacing padding from 0xA8 to 0xB0 with float xA8 and float xAC. Both newly matched ftPp_SpecialAirHiStart_1_Phys and ftPp_SpecialAirHiThrow_1_Phys pass these fields as the second and third arguments to ftCommon_Fall.
source_update_candidates.reason: Potential data-sheet update for recovered ftIceClimberAttributes field types and observed use; semantic names are not proven by this PR slice.

source_update_candidates.title: ftPopo SpecialS source contains matched SpecialAirHi Start/Throw physics functions
source_update_candidates.text: PR #2254 matched ftPp_SpecialAirHiStart_1_Phys and ftPp_SpecialAirHiThrow_1_Phys in src/melee/ft/chara/ftPopo/ftPp_SpecialS.c. The bot report lists both as new 100.00% matches, +84 bytes each.
source_update_candidates.reason: Useful path-level matching fact for future searches; curator should decide whether path_facts tracks historical PR match status.

rejection_notes: Do not infer semantic meanings for xA8 or xAC beyond typed float fields used as ftCommon_Fall arguments.
Do not promote PAD_STACK(8) as a general recommended tactic from this PR alone; the slice shows use plus match reports but no rationale or adjacent regression analysis.
Do not infer reviewer approval rationale because there were no review comments or reviews in the loaded slice.
